leads.email_subject: Your workshop page says Washington, DC — but you're in Silver Spring

Hi Howard,

I checked how your site shows up on Google though, and found a few things worth a look. Your "A Different Approach" page is indexed with the title "18th Century Italian Instrument Maker in Washington, DC" — but your Contact page and every directory listing I found place the workshop in Silver Spring, Maryland, so anyone searching by location could get thrown off. Separately, your Repairs page is indexed twice, once at /repairs.html and again at /repairs/, splitting whatever search credit that page earns between two URLs instead of one. And on Yelp, there are two listings for the business — the older one is marked "Closed" as of last July, sitting right next to a newer one that's active, which could make someone assume you've stopped taking repairs.
